form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into fourth after a quick start, behind Kia Ora Lou at this track over 1780m in a MAIDEN on March 19 at $7. Then a handy effort when beaten by 5 m finishing second behind Taking Stock at Albion Park over 1660m in a MAIDEN on March 30 at $4.80. Nice effort last time. Looks very hard to beat.
